3267460.name: AVENGE MYSELF
3267460.description:
Reject gravity. Go fast.

A high-speed physics-based speedrunning FPS inspired by 90's movement shooters and platformers. Move like you've never moved before.

  • Master gravity-defying physics-based movement with wall riding, loops, and more

  • Explore the last city of Terragrad in a sprawling hub with events and challenges at every turn

  • Race through varied stages with flexible level design, letting you find the fastest route on your own terms

  • Hunt for challenging medals requiring skill and planning to earn, then take to the leaderboards and challenge the fastest players in the world (or just your friends!)

  • Hit Mach 1 on the ground
3267460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
